analysis.classification_reasoning: Stock went from $24.45 to $44.90 (+81%) on a positive Phase 3 depression trial readout — a clean, binary, fundamentally de-risking catalyst. Retention of peak is 91% (closed $44.90 vs $46.95 high) and price made higher highs/higher lows every session post-news on sustained 3-7x relative volume. This is news-driven re-rating, not a low-float squeeze.
analysis.prediction_rationale: Base case is a grind higher into the $47-52 zone over 1-2 weeks as the readout gets digested and sell-side catches up, then consolidation. The tape shows zero distribution yet — Thursday and Friday both closed in the upper third of range on still-elevated volume. Confidence is low because small-cap biotechs that double on Phase 3 data almost universally print a dilutive secondary within 2-4 weeks, which would cap upside hard and likely trigger a 15-25% gap down.
